calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shawntay Jordan and Bryan Thompson appeared via zoom for and with Ruth Archid and Lawrence Tobias Wilson (petitioners).

The Court waives notice issues.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 19, 2017 is admitted to probate. Ruth Archid and Lawrence Tobias Wilson is appointed as the Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 19, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrigton is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
